name: Standard Plating
description: The default factory plating provided with all brand-new Mister Handy models. This has no cost, as it's the default which a Mister Handy character begins with most of the time.

name: Mister Gutsy Plating
description: Like the standard plating, but with better thermal absorption properties to reinforce it against energy weaponry, this is the standard plating for a Mister Gutsy. It is the default for all Mister Handy characters who select the Mister Gutsy starting package.

name: Factory Armor
description: A standardized, factory-made set of armor plating designed to fit any Mister Handy model.

name: Factory Armor
description: A standardized, factory-made set of armor plating designed to fit any Mister Handy model.

name: Factory Storage Armor
description: A factory-made set of standard armor which also provides additional storage compartments to increase a robot's carrying capacity.

name: Primal Plate
description: Makeshift supplementary armor that can be affixed to a robot's structure to provide extra protection from physical hazards. The bulk and crude design reduces the robot's carrying capacity, however.

name: Primal Plate
description: Makeshift supplementary armor that can be affixed to a robot's structure to provide extra protection from physical hazards. The bulk and crude design reduces the robot's carrying capacity, however.

name: Serrated Plate
description: Makeshift armor plating with jagged, serrated edges. Like primal plate, but more hazardous to those who would do the robot ill, as the sharp protrusions can lead to injury. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with serrated plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Persistent (Physical) damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with serrated plate gain the Persistent (Physical) damage effect.

name: Serrated Plate
description: Makeshift armor plating with jagged, serrated edges. Like primal plate, but more hazardous to those who would do the robot ill, as the sharp protrusions can lead to injury. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with serrated plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Persistent (Physical) damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with serrated plate gain the Persistent (Physical) damage effect.

name: Noxious Plate
description: Makeshift armor coated in toxic materials which are hazardous to the health of any who seeks to inflict harm on the robot or its companions. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with noxious plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Persistent (Poison) damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with noxious plate gain the Persistent (Poison) damage effect.

name: Noxious Plate
description: Makeshift armor coated in toxic materials which are hazardous to the health of any who seeks to inflict harm on the robot or its companions. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with noxious plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Persistent (Poison) damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with noxious plate gain the Persistent (Poison) damage effect.

name: Toxic Plate
description: Makeshift armor made with irradiated metal plating, dangerous to living creatures nearby. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with toxic plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Radiation damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with toxic plate gain the Radioactive damage effect.

name: Toxic Plate
description: Makeshift armor made with irradiated metal plating, dangerous to living creatures nearby. Special: When a melee attack is made against a location fitted with toxic plate and the attacker suffers a complication, the attacker suffers 2D Radiation damage. In addition, melee attacks made using arms fitted with toxic plate gain the Radioactive damage effect.

name: Actuated Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates fitted with actuators and motive systems which aid the robot's actions. Special: Melee attacks made from arms fitted with an actuated frame inflict +1D damage. If the robot's Thruster is fitted with an actuated frame, it may make both a Move minor action and a Sprint major action in the same turn.

name: Actuated Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates fitted with actuators and motive systems which aid the robot's actions. Special: Melee attacks made from arms fitted with an actuated frame inflict +1D damage. If the robot's Thruster is fitted with an actuated frame, it may make both a Move minor action and a Sprint major action in the same turn.

name: Voltaic Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates fitted with additional conduits and capacitors to bolster the effectiveness of energy weaponry. Special: Any of the robot's attacks which deal energy damage inflict +1D if the robot is fitted with any voltaic frame armor. This bonus increases by +1D for every two additional locations fitted with Voltaic Frame.

name: Voltaic Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates fitted with additional conduits and capacitors to bolster the effectiveness of energy weaponry. Special: Any of the robot's attacks which deal energy damage inflict +1D if the robot is fitted with any voltaic frame armor. This bonus increases by +1D for every two additional locations fitted with Voltaic Frame.

name: Hydraulic Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates which conceal powerful hydraulics which enhance the robot's movements. Special: Melee attacks made from arms fitted with a hydraulic frame inflict +2 damage and gain the Stun damage effect.

name: Hydraulic Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates which conceal powerful hydraulics which enhance the robot's movements. Special: Melee attacks made from arms fitted with a hydraulic frame inflict +1DD damage and gain the Stun damage effect.

name: Hydraulic Frame
description: A specially made set of armor plates which conceal powerful hydraulics which enhance the robot's movements. Special: Melee attacks made from arms fitted with a hydraulic frame inflict +1DD damage and gain the Stun damage effect.
